note: CRLB sigma_pos ~ 1/m_t (exponent ~-1) at fixed range, so usable depth z_max(tau) ~ m_t^0.25: a 16x moment buys only ~2x depth. Doubling usable depth needs ~16x moment (~16x power -> Ch.37 thermal wall) -> multi-generator (Ch.9.8) is the practical deep-volume/bariatric route, not brute moment.
